summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an independent PR inventory shard. Closed candidates are skipped as already closed; open candidates are kept independent, routed to maintainer review where the artifact shows unresolved review/merge judgment, or quarantined only where security-sensitive exposure or boundary evidence appears.

actions.reason: Maintainer judgment is needed on whether this partial fix should land independently and how to track the remaining #85242 scope.
